series_metadata.series_description: Documents enforcement actions regarding violations within the charitable sector. Records include, but are not limited to, copies of enforcement action records including settlement agreements, assurances of discontinuance, and judgments.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain permanently, unless microfilmed. ; Paper: If in paper, retain permanently, unless microfilmed. ; Microform: If microfilmed, retain permanently., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent
